# Slide One

Front-matter `finish: sketch` should apply the `sketch` class here.

---

<!-- _class: cards-grid -->

## Slide Two

Per-slide `_class: cards-grid` should COMPOSE with the deck-wide `finish:`
register, not replace it — this section must carry both `cards-grid` and
`sketch`.

- One
  - body
- Two
  - body

---

# Slide Three

`finish: sketch` should also apply here, with no per-slide directive.
